S

Sends the object to the other program.

Sends the player name to other side.

Set the DEFENCE of ship, when it has been on this card played.

setEnemyCards() - Method in class battleship.model.BattleshipGameTest
 
setEnemyCards(CardsG) - Method in class battleship.view.Battleship
Sets the enemy cards with help of the controller.
setEnemyCards(ArrayList<Cards>) - Method in class battleship.controller.BattleshipController
When the CardsList of players over network shared, that will be saved by controller in model, and the move will be on enemyCards in this way applied.
setEnemyCards(ArrayList<Cards>) - Method in interface battleship.controller.IBattleshipController
When the CardsList of players over network shared, that will be saved by controller in model, and the move will be on enemyCards in this way applied.
setEnemyCards(ArrayList<Cards>) - Method in class battleship.model.BattleshipGame
Set the enemyCards list.
setEnemyName(String) - Method in class battleship.view.Battleship
Sets the name of enemy, if thread receives the name of other player.
setHandCards() - Method in class battleship.model.BattleshipGame
After the cards are created and saved in corresponding lists, with the help of this method in constructor first five play cards are taken and saved in handCards list.
setNewSelection(int) - Method in class battleship.view.Battleship
Sets the index number of selected hand cards when the Battleship.keyPressed()
setOpened(boolean) - Method in class battleship.model.Cards
Set the parameter of opened true or false, when it has been from enemy on this card played.

setSank(boolean) - Method in class battleship.model.Cards
Set the ship SANK variable true, when it lost all its power.

Set the game state.
setState(GameState) - Method in interface battleship.controller.IBattleshipController
Set the game state.
setStrikedShipCardsRedBlue() - Method in class battleship.model.CardsTest
 
setStruck(boolean) - Method in class battleship.model.Cards
Set the variable of 'STRUCK' for ship, when it has been from enemy attacked.
setTeam() - Method in class battleship.view.Battleship
Set the color of team and turn.

Sets the size of game.
setTurn() - Method in class battleship.view.Battleship
Set the turn true, if thread receives the String 'TURN'.

Initial setup of game.
setWinnerText() - Method in class battleship.view.Battleship
Sets the winnerText, if thread receives from other side the String 'YOU'.

shieldRed - Variable in class battleship.model.CardsTest
